steps.title: Analyze the equation
steps.content: Isolate $x^2$: $$x^2=\tfrac{49}{16}.$$ The right side is positive, so $x=\pm\tfrac{7}{4}$.

steps.title: Count the solutions
steps.content: There are two real solutions, $\tfrac{7}{4}$ and $-\tfrac{7}{4}$. That matches the correct answer — C is correct.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to match the computed result to the answer choices. The value or equation found above is Exactly two. The other choices do not satisfy the same condition from the question, so C is correct.
